title: Seared Ladder (Backport)
description: Backports the seared ladder from tconstruct 1.16+
body:
Backports the seared ladder from tconstruct 1.16+. The seared ladder is a block that makes it super easy to get in or out of a smeltery! Useful for people like me who regularly fall into their smelteries, or who need blood for a craft and find it awkward to get back out.

![](https://i.imgur.com/dJoKNwT.gif)

Credits:  
-all code and textures by me  
-block models, language support, and original idea by tconstruct
